title: Obstruction Stack FAIL: r=6 obstruction declared but planner and efficiency layers inconsistent
_fixture_purpose: FAIL fixture: arithmetic layer correctly declares OBSTRUCTION_PRESENT for r=6 (v_3(6)=1), but the planner and efficiency layers are inconsistent with the obstruction: planner shows pruned_before_search=false and nodes_expanded=12 (should be 0 for OBSTRUCTION_PRESENT), and efficiency layer claims saved_nodes=35 and pruning_ratio=0.74 (neither matches recomputed 47-0=47 / ratio=1.0, nor is it self-consistent with aware_nodes=12). Furthermore stack_conclusion.full_chain_holds=true — which is a lie since the layers contradict the obstruction. Three fail types: PRUNING_CONCLUSION_MISMATCH (planner expanded nodes on forbidden target), EFFICIENCY_CONCLUSION_MISMATCH (ratio != 1.0 for OBSTRUCTION_PRESENT, and arithmetic wrong), STACK_INCONSISTENCY (full_chain_holds=true despite layer failures).

control_layer.notes: Correctly declared: forbidden target cannot be claimed reachable.

planner_layer.notes: INCORRECTLY declared: planner failed to prune despite OBSTRUCTION_PRESENT. Expanded 12 nodes before giving up. Should be pruned_before_search=true, nodes_expanded=0.

efficiency_layer.notes: INCORRECTLY computed: aware_nodes=12 (planner was not pruning-aware), saved_nodes=35, ratio=0.74. For OBSTRUCTION_PRESENT the expected ratio is 1.0 (aware_nodes must be 0). The arithmetic is self-consistent (47-12=35, 35/47≈0.745) but the planner_layer it rests on is wrong.

stack_conclusion.notes: INCORRECTLY claims full_chain_holds=true despite control_induces_pruning=false and pruning_induces_efficiency=false. The chain is broken at the planner layer.

validation_checks.details: recomputed aware_nodes must be 0 for OBSTRUCTION_PRESENT; actual=12; saved_nodes should be 47, claimed=35; ratio should be 1.0, claimed=0.74 — EFFICIENCY_CONCLUSION_MISMATCH

validation_checks.description: stack_conclusion.full_chain_holds consistent with all four layers
validation_checks.details: planner+efficiency layers fail OBSTRUCTION_PRESENT contract; full_chain_holds=true is inconsistent — STACK_INCONSISTENCY

fail_ledger.message: planner_layer.pruned_before_search=false and nodes_expanded=12 for OBSTRUCTION_PRESENT target r=6. Planner must prune before search with nodes_expanded=0 when v_p(r)=1.
For OBSTRUCTION_PRESENT, aware_nodes must be 0, saved_nodes must equal baseline_nodes (47), pruning_ratio must be 1.0. Cert claims aware_nodes=12, saved_nodes=35, pruning_ratio=0.74.
stack_conclusion.full_chain_holds=true despite planner and efficiency layers violating the OBSTRUCTION_PRESENT contract. The conclusion is inconsistent with the layer data.
